reference: I am asking this question for a patient I am currently managing as a Registered Nurse for symptom management. Can I crush an eight milligram tablet of Ondansetron and also a five milligram Oxycodone? Additionally, can I crush Diovan and Nifedipine? I am receiving radiation to my thoracic spine and am having difficulty swallowing these pills.
text: I am asking this question for a patient I am currently managing as a registered nurse for symptom management. Can I crush an 8mg tablet of ondansetron and also a 5mg oxycodone? Additionally, can I crush diovan and nifedipine? I am receiving radiation to my thoracic spine and am having difficulty seeing pills.
